message:
feat: add pane reservation model with storage schema and TTL expiry

Implements wa-nu4.1.6.1 — the pane_reservations table and full storage
API for exclusive per-pane workflow locks.

Schema:
- Migration v8: pane_reservations table with FK to panes, status/expiry
  indexes, partial index on active+expires_at
- SCHEMA_SQL updated for fresh database creation

Data structures:
- PaneReservation: full row model with is_active() helper
- PaneReservationConfig: default/max TTL with clamp_ttl()

Storage API (sync + async):
- create_reservation_sync: one-active-per-pane conflict detection,
  expired reservations treated as released
- release_reservation_sync: sets status=released with timestamp
- get_active_reservation_sync: read-only, filters expired
- list_active_reservations_sync: all active+unexpired, ordered by age
- expire_stale_reservations_sync: bulk-expire past-TTL reservations
- WriteCommand variants: CreateReservation, ReleaseReservation,
  ExpireStaleReservations
- Async StorageHandle methods wrapping all sync functions

Tests (28 new):
- PaneReservation is_active boundary (valid/expired/released)
- PaneReservationConfig defaults and clamp_ttl (within/below/above)
- Conflict detection: duplicate active fails, allowed after release
- Multi-pane isolation: different panes can have concurrent reservations
- Release: sets released, nonexistent returns false, idempotent
- Get active: returns Some/None correctly after create/release
- List: empty, multiple, excludes released
- Expire stale: none to expire, expires past TTL, preserves valid
- Round-trips: reserve→release→re-reserve, expired allows new
- TTL correctness: expires_at = created_at + ttl_ms
- Serde round-trip: JSON serialize/deserialize

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
